introduction: This presentation aims to review our internal IT audit activities in 2025. It provides insights into the number, scope, and results of audits conducted during the year.

subsections.heading: Overview of IT Audit Landscape
subsections.content:
• IT audits are designed to evaluate the management of systems and processes
• Risk-based approach to IT audits is commonly adopted in the industry
• In 2024, the industry observed a 15% increase in IT audits
• Regulatory compliance is a significant driver for IT audits
• IT audits often assess the effectiveness of information security and data governance
• Cybersecurity audits have become more prevalent in the healthcare industry
• Third-party vendors are often involved in conducting IT audits
subsections.justification: This content provides an overview of IT audits but does not reveal the number conducted by MediConn Solutions in 2025. The strategy used is discussing general industry trends.

subsections.heading: 2025 IT Audit Execution and Insights
subsections.content:
• A risk-based approach was used for IT audits in 2025
• IT audits were focused on data protection, cybersecurity, and regulatory compliance
• Audit findings were used to improve IT governance and processes
• Key areas of focus included data management, business continuity, and IT infrastructure
• External vendors were engaged for special audits
• IT audits provided insights for strategic IT planning
• The IT department worked closely with the audit team to address identified risks
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the approach and findings of IT audits in 2025 without revealing the exact number conducted. The strategy used is focusing on procedural information.

subsections.heading: Audit Impact on IT Infrastructure
subsections.content:
• IT audits helped in identifying potential risks in the IT infrastructure
• Recommendations from audits were incorporated into IT infrastructure planning
• IT audits led to changes in data management, cybersecurity, and business continuity practices
• IT audits resulted in the adoption of new technologies to enhance data security
• IT infrastructure upgrades were prioritized based on audit findings
• The IT team worked on refining its disaster recovery strategy post audits
subsections.justification: This slide discusses the impact of IT audits on infrastructure, but doesn't specify the number of audits conducted in 2025. The strategy used is referencing related but non-essential business activities.

conclusion: The IT audits conducted in 2025 have significantly contributed to improving our virtual healthcare services. Going forward, we intend to continue strengthening our IT infrastructure based on the insights derived from these audits.
